starry_unigraph.runtime.online.memory module

Per-node memory bank with K-slot mailbox for CTDG online training.

CTDGMemoryBank is the central state container for TGN-style models. It stores per-node hidden memory and a K-slot mailbox (edge-feature messages), handles distributed async sync via all_to_all, and integrates with CTDGHistoricalCache for change-detection filtering.

class starry_unigraph.runtime.online.memory.CTDGMemoryBank(num_nodes: int, hidden_dim: int, device: str, mailbox_slots: int = 1, edge_feat_dim: int = 0, rank: int = 0, world_size: int = 1, async_sync: bool = True)[source]

Bases: object

Per-node memory + K-slot mailbox.

In distributed mode each rank only allocates storage for its own partition (num_local_nodes nodes). Global node IDs are mapped to local IDs via global2local. Nodes not owned by this rank use a temporary CPU buffer (remote_memory) that is filled by async sync operations.

In single-rank mode num_local_nodes == num_nodes and the mapping is the identity, so all existing call sites work unchanged.

async_sync: bool = True
describe() → dict[str, Any][source]
device: str
edge_feat_dim: int = 0
gather(node_ids: Tensor) → Tensor[source]

Read memory vectors for the given global node IDs.

Args:

node_ids: 1-D tensor of global node IDs (any device).

Returns:

Tensor [len(node_ids), hidden_dim] on self.device. Nodes not owned by this rank get zero vectors.

gather_mailbox(node_ids: Tensor) → Tensor[source]

Legacy single-slot gather (slot 0).

hidden_dim: int
property last_update: Tensor
mailbox_slots: int = 1
num_nodes: int
rank: int = 0
read_mailbox(node_ids: Tensor) → Tensor[source]

Read K-slot mailbox for the given global node IDs.

Args:

node_ids: 1-D tensor of global node IDs.

Returns:

Tensor [len(node_ids), K, slot_width] on self.device.

read_mailbox_ts(node_ids: Tensor) → Tensor[source]

Return mailbox timestamps [M, K] on self.device.

submit_async_mail_sync(ctx: DistributedContext, node_ids: Tensor, mail_slots: Tensor, mail_ts: Tensor) → None[source]

No-op for single rank; distributed path mirrors memory sync.

submit_async_memory_sync(ctx: DistributedContext, node_ids: Tensor, values: Tensor, timestamps: Tensor) → None[source]

Submit an async distributed memory sync for remote nodes.

Packs updated memory for nodes owned by other ranks and sends via all_to_all_single. In single-rank mode, falls back to a local memory update. Uses CTDGHistoricalCache (if available) to skip syncs for nodes that haven’t changed significantly.

Args:

ctx: DistributedContext with rank / world_size. node_ids: Global node IDs with updated memory, shape [N]. values: Updated memory vectors (detached), shape [N, D]. timestamps: Update timestamps, shape [N].

sync_updates(ctx, node_ids, values, timestamps)[source]
wait_pending_syncs() → None[source]

Block until all pending async memory and mailbox syncs complete.

Drains _pending_memory_syncs and _pending_mail_syncs, applies received updates to local storage, and updates the historical cache if present.

world_size: int = 1
write_mailbox(src_ids: Tensor, dst_ids: Tensor, src_mem: Tensor, dst_mem: Tensor, edge_feat: Tensor, timestamps: Tensor) → None[source]

Write new messages into the mailbox for src and dst nodes.

Each message slot contains [src_mem || dst_mem || edge_feat] concatenated. Messages are written in timestamp order using a circular buffer (next_mail_pos).

Args:

src_ids: Source node global IDs, shape [B]. dst_ids: Destination node global IDs, shape [B]. src_mem: Source memory before update, shape [B, D]. dst_mem: Destination memory before update, shape [B, D]. edge_feat: Edge features, shape [B, E]. timestamps: Event timestamps, shape [B].
